task_description: Build a completely new task management system as a panel component (TaskPanel.jsx) integrated into the ThoughtFlow mind-map application. Tasks are actions (not knowledge), support location pins for navigation, manual ordering, sections (Today/Upcoming/No Due Date/Completed), and full backup/import/export support. Must scale to 80-90+ active tasks without visual overload.

verification.summary: npm run build completes successfully. Semantic review v2 returned APPROVED. All 5 review issues addressed (reorder section awareness, orphaned pin cleanup, cross-workspace navigation, ID collision prevention, sortOrder monotonicity). Minor keyboard guard issue also fixed.
